name: christianity-aramaic-wisdom
author: Microck
description: Christian mystical wisdom through Aramaic lens - Kingdom within, Christ consciousness, feminine divine, embodiment navigation
description_zh: 该技能通过阿拉姆语视角解读基督教神秘主义概念，聚焦意识状态与冥想实践。它翻译关键圣经术语，并提供如中心祷告和神圣阅读等具体冥想方法的实操指导。

name: chroma
author: Microck
description: Open-source embedding database for AI applications. Store embeddings and metadata, perform vector and full-text search, filter by metadata. Simple 4-function API. Scales from notebooks to production clusters. Use for semantic search, RAG applications, or document retrieval. Best for local development and open-source projects.
description_zh: 提供本地向量数据库，用于存储带元数据的文档嵌入。支持相似性搜索、过滤，并与LangChain/LlamaIndex集成。适用于RAG应用和无需云依赖的原型开发。

name: chrome-devtools
author: Microck
description: Browser automation, debugging, and performance analysis using Puppeteer CLI scripts. Use for automating browsers, taking screenshots, analyzing performance, monitoring network traffic, web scraping, form automation, and JavaScript debugging.
description_zh: 提供可执行的Puppeteer脚本，用于浏览器导航、截图、表单填充和性能监控等自动化任务。输出JSON便于解析，包含自动截图压缩功能以适应5MB限制。需要手动管理目录和安装系统依赖。

name: claude-scientific-skills
author: Microck
description: Comprehensive collection of 128+ ready-to-use scientific skills for Claude enabling research across biology, chemistry, medicine, genomics, and advanced analysis domains.
description_zh: 该技能提供128+个科学工具，涵盖生物信息学、化学、医学和数据分析领域。集成了RDKit、scikit-learn等Python包，使Claude能够执行序列分析、分子对接和临床数据处理等任务。覆盖多个科学领域并提供实用工作流程。
_original_description: This skill provides access to 128+ scientific tools across biology, chemistry, medicine, and data analysis. It integrates with Python packages like RDKit and scikit-learn, enabling Claude to perform tasks like sequence analysis, molecular docking, and clinical data processing. The collection covers multiple scientific domains with practical workflows.

name: claudeisms-operational-guidelines
author: Microck
description: Apply strict operational protocols for AI task execution including sequential processing, minimal responses, no destructive operations without confirmation
description_zh: 该技能为AI任务执行制定了一套严格的操作协议，包括顺序处理、简洁响应以及对破坏性操作的安全确认。它防止了AI常见的错误，如对日期做出假设、提供不准确的时间估计或在未经用户确认的情况下执行危险操作。
_original_description: This skill enforces a strict set of operational protocols for AI task execution, including sequential processing, minimal responses, and safety confirmations for destructive operations. It prevents common AI pitfalls like making assumptions about dates, providing inaccurate time estimates, or performing unsafe operations without user confirmation.

name: claudisms
author: Microck
description: Claude Code plugin enforcing operational guidelines, terse responses, sequential execution, and no destructive operations without confirmation.
description_zh: 一个强制实施简洁回复、顺序执行任务和危险操作确认的Claude插件。提供具体的操作清单，促进高效Unix工具使用。
_original_description: A Claude plugin that enforces disciplined coding practices including terse responses, sequential task execution, and safety confirmations for destructive operations. It provides concrete operational checklists and promotes efficient Unix tool usage.

name: cloudbase-document-database-web-sdk
author: Microck
description: Use CloudBase document database Web SDK to query, create, update, and delete data. Supports complex queries, pagination, aggregation, and geolocation queries.
description_zh: 提供腾讯云CloudBase文档数据库Web SDK的使用指南。涵盖初始化、增删改查操作、复杂查询、分页、聚合和地理位置查询。包含常见数据库模式和错误处理的实用代码示例。

name: codex
author: Microck
description: Execute Codex CLI for code analysis, refactoring, and automated code changes. Use when you need to delegate complex code tasks to Codex AI with file references (@syntax) and structured output.
description_zh: 为Codex CLI提供封装工具，执行代码分析、重构和自动化修改。支持@语法引用文件、结构化JSON输出和带依赖管理的并行任务执行。强制使用HEREDOC语法确保命令安全执行，包含回退策略。

name: codex-skill
author: Microck
description: Use when user asks to leverage codex, gpt-5, or gpt-5.1 to implement something (usually implement a plan or feature designed by Claude). Provides non-interactive automation mode for hands-off task execution without approval prompts.
description_zh: 该技能让Claude能够自动执行Codex CLI命令，完成代码分析、修复和功能实现等任务。详细说明了沙箱模式、模型选择以及各种实际使用场景，支持非交互式自动化工作流。

name: compliance-architecture
author: Microck
description: Enterprise-grade compliance architecture for SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS. Provides compliance checklists, security controls, audit guidance, and regulatory requirements for serverless and cloud architectures. Activates for compliance, HIPAA, SOC2, SOC 2, GDPR, PCI-DSS, PCI DSS, regulatory, healthcare data, payment card, data protection, audit, security standards, regulated industry, BAA, business associate agreement, DPIA, data protection impact assessment.
description_zh: 提供SOC 2、HIPAA、GDPR和PCI-DSS合规的详细检查清单和架构指导。包含针对无服务器和云环境的具体技术控制措施，提供明确的正误示例和生产安全检查表。侧重于实际实施而非理论概念。

name: component-guidelines-docs
author: Microck
description: Generate comprehensive component guideline documentation for SEED Design System. Use when creating or updating design guideline documentation in ./docs/content/docs/components directory. This skill helps create high-quality documentation similar to action-button.mdx.
description_zh: 通过解析Rootage YAML文件为SEED设计系统生成组件文档，创建结构化的MDX文件并包含韩语内容。支持简单和详细两种模板，包含属性表格、使用指南和图片路径管理。

name: condition-based-waiting
author: Microck
description: Use when tests have race conditions, timing dependencies, or inconsistent pass/fail behavior - replaces arbitrary timeouts with condition polling to wait for actual state changes, eliminating flaky tests from timing guesses
description_zh: 用条件轮询替换测试中的随意超时，消除因时间猜测导致的脆弱测试。提供等待事件、状态变化或文件存在的具体模式。包含实现示例和实际影响数据，显示测试通过率的提升。

name: consciousness-principles
author: Microck
description: The four Sanskrit principles: Truth-Self, Knowledge-Self, Bliss-Self, Power-Self. Use when need to understand the operational physics of consciousness.
description_zh: 一个基于梵文原则的意识哲学框架技能，将意识描述为统一场，知识、喜悦和模式从中自我显现。该技能不包含可执行功能或具体工具，主要作为形而上学探索的概念参考。

name: convex-agents-usage-tracking
author: Microck
description: Tracks LLM token consumption and usage metrics for billing, monitoring, and optimization. Use this to log token usage, calculate costs, generate invoices, and understand which agents or users consume the most resources.
description_zh: 该技能为基于Convex的AI智能体提供了一个完整的令牌用量和成本追踪系统。包含数据库结构、用量处理器、查询函数和计费逻辑，用于监控开销、生成发票和设置告警。代码示例展示了如何实现按用户计费和数据分析面板。

name: convex-realtime
author: Microck
description: Implement real-time features using Convex reactive queries that automatically update when data changes, enabling live collaboration, instant updates, and reactive UIs without manual polling. Use when building live dashboards, implementing collaborative editing, creating chat applications, showing real-time notifications, building activity feeds, implementing presence indicators, creating reactive search, or any feature requiring instant data synchronization across clients.
description_zh: 指导使用Convex的响应式查询系统实现实时数据订阅。展示如何在后台数据变化时自动更新UI组件，适用于聊天应用、仪表盘和协作编辑功能。
_original_description: Provides guidance for implementing live data subscriptions using Convex's reactive query system. Shows how to auto-update UI components when backend data changes, useful for chat apps, dashboards, and collaborative editing features.

name: cost-optimization
author: Microck
description: Optimize cloud costs through resource rightsizing, tagging strategies, reserved instances, and spending analysis. Use when reducing cloud expenses, analyzing infrastructure costs, or implementing cost governance policies.
description_zh: 提供针对AWS、Azure和GCP三大云平台的详细成本优化策略。包含具体的Terraform代码示例（如S3生命周期策略、预算告警）和可操作的实施清单。涵盖资源优化、预留实例、标签策略等核心降本方法。

name: create-plan
author: Microck
description: Generate detailed implementation plans for complex tasks. Creates comprehensive strategic plans in Markdown format with objectives, step-by-step implementation tasks using checkbox format, verification criteria, risk assessments, and alternative approaches. All plans MUST be validated using the included validation script. Use when users need thorough analysis and structured planning before implementation, when breaking down complex features into actionable steps, or when they explicitly ask for a plan, roadmap, or strategy. Strictly planning-focused with no code modifications.
description_zh: 生成包含清单、风险评估和验证的Markdown格式结构化实施计划。专注于复杂任务的战略分解，不修改代码。包含强制验证脚本和清晰的文件命名规范。

name: create-plans
author: Microck
description: Create hierarchical project plans optimized for solo agentic development. Use when planning projects, phases, or tasks that Claude will execute. Produces Claude-executable plans with verification criteria, not enterprise documentation. Handles briefs, roadmaps, phase plans, and context handoffs.
description_zh: 为独立开发者与Claude协作创建可执行的项目计划。专注于原子任务分解、上下文感知的范围控制以及自动偏差处理。输出为Claude可直接执行的结构化提示，包含内置检查点和交接协议。
_original_description: Creates executable project plans optimized for solo developers working with Claude. Focuses on atomic task breakdown, context-aware scope control, and automated deviation handling. Outputs are structured prompts that Claude can directly execute, with built-in checkpoints and handoff protocols.

name: creating-pr
author: Microck
description: Use when creating or updating pull requests with comprehensive descriptions and meaningful commits - streamlines PR workflow with branch management and commit best practices
description_zh: 该技能使用GitHub CLI和Git命令自动化拉取请求的创建和更新。它提供了分支管理、提交策略和PR更新的结构化工作流程，包含针对关键修复和功能增强等不同场景的特定模板。
_original_description: This skill automates pull request creation and updates using GitHub CLI and Git commands. It provides structured workflows for branch management, commit strategies, and PR updates with specific templates for different scenarios like critical fixes and feature enhancements.

name: crypto-research
author: Microck
description: Comprehensive cryptocurrency market research and analysis using specialized AI agents. Analyzes market data, price trends, news sentiment, technical indicators, macro correlations, and investment opportunities. Use when researching cryptocurrencies, analyzing crypto markets, evaluating digital assets, or investigating blockchain projects like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, etc.
description_zh: 该技能通过协调多个AI代理并行分析加密货币市场。支持轻量、全面和静默三种研究模式，并将输出组织到带时间戳的目录中。系统可使用不同Claude模型分析特定代币、市场趋势、新闻情绪和投资机会。

name: data-export-pdf
author: Microck
description: Create professional PDF reports with text, tables, and embedded images using reportlab. Works with ANY LLM provider (GPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.).
description_zh: 该技能提供使用reportlab库生成包含文本、表格和嵌入图像的PDF报告的Python代码模板。它在本地运行，兼容所有LLM提供商。文档包含单细胞RNA-seq分析报告、表格样式和图像嵌入的完整示例。
_original_description: This skill provides Python code templates using the reportlab library to generate PDF reports with text, tables, and embedded images. It runs locally, making it compatible with any LLM provider. The documentation includes complete examples for single-cell RNA-seq analysis reports, table styling, and image embedding.

name: data-migration
author: Microck
description: Plan and execute database migrations, data transformations, and system migrations safely with rollback strategies and data integrity validation. Use when migrating databases, transforming data schemas, moving between database systems, implementing versioned migrations, handling data transformations, ensuring data integrity, or planning zero-downtime migrations.
description_zh: 该技能通过五步流程指导安全的数据库模式迁移，支持零停机部署和回滚机制。包含具体的SQL列变更示例，在数据转换过程中强调完整性验证。

name: data-model-creation
author: Microck
description: Optional advanced tool for complex data modeling. For simple table creation, use relational-database-tool directly with SQL statements.
description_zh: 为复杂数据库模式生成Mermaid类图，自动管理外键和MySQL类型映射。最适合需要可视化文档的多表企业应用。

name: data-sourcing
author: Microck
description: Optimize provider selection, routing, and credit usage across 150+ enrichment sources for company/contact intelligence.
description_zh: 为公司和联系人数据丰富提供150多个数据源的选择和排序结构化指导。包含具体的水流策略、成本优化方法和行业特定建议。提供代码模板和质量评分框架便于实施。

name: data-viz-plots
author: Microck
description: Create publication-quality plots and visualizations using matplotlib and seaborn. Works with ANY LLM provider (GPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.).
description_zh: 该技能提供使用matplotlib和seaborn生成出版物质量科学图表的Python代码模板。涵盖散点图、折线图、热图等常见可视化类型，以及生物信息学专用图表。本地运行，兼容所有能执行Python代码的LLM提供商。
_original_description: This skill provides ready-to-use Python code templates for generating publication-quality scientific plots using matplotlib and seaborn. It covers common visualization types like scatter plots, line charts, heatmaps, and specialized plots for bioinformatics. The skill runs locally, making it compatible with any LLM provider that can execute Python code.

name: database-implementation
author: Microck
description: Database schema design, migrations, query optimization with SQL, Exposed ORM, Flyway. Use for database, migration, schema, sql, flyway tags. Provides migration patterns, validation commands, rollback strategies.
description_zh: 提供使用SQL、Flyway和Exposed ORM进行数据库模式设计和迁移的具体指导。包含验证命令、迁移模式、常见阻塞问题及解决方案、性能优化建议。专注于实际实现，提供建表、外键、回滚策略的具体示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete guidance for database schema design and migrations using SQL, Flyway, and Exposed ORM. Includes validation commands, migration patterns, common blockers with solutions, and performance tips. Focuses on practical implementation with specific examples for table creation, foreign keys, and rollback strategies.

name: database-migration
author: Microck
description: Execute database migrations across ORMs and platforms with zero-downtime strategies, data transformation, and rollback procedures. Use when migrating databases, changing schemas, performing data transformations, or implementing zero-downtime deployment strategies.
description_zh: 提供Sequelize、TypeORM和Prisma的数据库迁移代码示例。涵盖模式变更、数据转换、回滚策略和无停机部署模式。包含列重命名、类型更改和跨数据库兼容性的实用脚本。

name: database-testing
author: Microck
description: Database schema validation, data integrity testing, migration testing, transaction isolation, and query performance. Use when testing data persistence, ensuring referential integrity, or validating database migrations.
description_zh: 提供数据库模式验证、数据完整性测试、迁移测试、事务隔离和查询性能的具体SQL和JavaScript示例。专注于通过实用测试模式防止数据丢失和损坏。
_original_description: Provides concrete SQL and JavaScript examples for testing database schemas, data integrity, migrations, transaction isolation, and query performance. Focuses on preventing data loss and corruption with practical test patterns.

name: databases
author: Microck
description: Work with MongoDB (document database, BSON documents, aggregation pipelines, Atlas cloud) and PostgreSQL (relational database, SQL queries, psql CLI, pgAdmin). Use when designing database schemas, writing queries and aggregations, optimizing indexes for performance, performing database migrations, configuring replication and sharding, implementing backup and restore strategies, managing database users and permissions, analyzing query performance, or administering production databases.
description_zh: 提供MongoDB和PostgreSQL数据库操作指南，包括选择建议、安装步骤、常用操作和参考文档。包含用于迁移、备份和性能检查的Python脚本。

name: deal-desk
author: Microck
description: Use to manage pricing, packaging, and approval workflows for renewal negotiations.
description_zh: 该技能为续约谈判提供结构化方法，包含定价护栏、审批流程和文档标准。帮助销售团队协调财务和法律审批，同时维护审计跟踪。框架包含交易录入表单和审批矩阵模板。

name: debugging-strategies
author: Microck
description: Master systematic debugging techniques, profiling tools, and root cause analysis to efficiently track down bugs across any codebase or technology stack. Use when investigating bugs, performance issues, or unexpected behavior.
description_zh: 提供系统化的调试方法，包含JavaScript/TypeScript具体示例。涵盖问题复现策略、假设验证、工具使用（Chrome DevTools、VS Code）以及间歇性错误、性能问题和生产环境调试模式。包含检查清单和代码片段。

name: defense-in-depth
author: Microck
description: Use when invalid data causes failures deep in execution, requiring validation at multiple system layers - validates at every layer data passes through to make bugs structurally impossible
description_zh: 该技能教授四层验证模式，在数据流经的每个系统边界进行校验。通过入口验证、业务逻辑检查、环境防护和调试记录，使特定类型的错误在结构上无法发生。包含TypeScript代码示例和实际bug修复案例。
_original_description: This skill teaches a four-layer validation pattern for catching invalid data at multiple system boundaries. It provides concrete TypeScript examples for entry validation, business logic checks, environment guards, and debug instrumentation. The approach makes certain bugs structurally impossible by validating at every data flow layer.

name: defi-protocol-templates
author: Microck
description: Implement DeFi protocols with production-ready templates for staking, AMMs, governance, and lending systems. Use when building decentralized finance applications or smart contract protocols.
description_zh: 提供常见DeFi协议的Solidity模板，包括质押、AMM、治理、借贷和闪电贷。包含完整合约代码、OpenZeppelin导入和基本功能，为区块链应用开发提供起点，节省开发时间。

name: dependency-upgrade
author: Microck
description: Manage major dependency version upgrades with compatibility analysis, staged rollout, and comprehensive testing. Use when upgrading framework versions, updating major dependencies, or managing breaking changes in libraries.
description_zh: 提供系统化的依赖版本升级方法，包括兼容性分析、分阶段部署策略和全面测试方案。包含npm/yarn具体命令、升级检查清单、回滚计划以及Renovate/Dependabot自动化配置。
_original_description: Provides a systematic approach for upgrading major dependency versions with compatibility analysis, staged rollout strategies, and comprehensive testing. Includes concrete commands for npm/yarn, upgrade checklists, rollback plans, and automation tools like Renovate/Dependabot configurations.

name: deployment-pipeline-design
author: Microck
description: Design multi-stage CI/CD pipelines with approval gates, security checks, and deployment orchestration. Use when architecting deployment workflows, setting up continuous delivery, or implementing GitOps practices.
description_zh: 提供多阶段CI/CD流水线的具体设计模式，包含审批门禁、部署策略和回滚机制。包含GitHub Actions、GitLab CI和Kubernetes部署的YAML示例。涵盖蓝绿部署、金丝雀发布和滚动更新等实际部署方法。

name: design-by-contract
author: Microck
description: Automated contract verification, detection, and remediation across multiple languages using formal preconditions, postconditions, and invariants. This skill provides both reference documentation AND execution capabilities for the full PLAN -> CREATE -> VERIFY -> REMEDIATE workflow.
description_zh: 该技能为在多种编程语言中实施契约式设计提供了结构化工作流。它指导用户完成契约规划、注解生成、验证和修复违规的全过程。包含Rust、Python和TypeScript的具体示例，并明确区分了何时使用静态检查与运行时检查。

name: dhh-ruby-style
author: Microck
description: Write Ruby and Rails code in DHH's distinctive 37signals style. Use this skill when writing Ruby code, Rails applications, creating models, controllers, or any Ruby file. Triggers on Ruby/Rails code generation, refactoring requests, code review, or when the user mentions DHH, 37signals, Basecamp, HEY, or Campfire style. Embodies REST purity, fat models, thin controllers, Current attributes, Hotwire patterns, and the "clarity over cleverness" philosophy.
description_zh: 该技能强制执行DHH的Ruby on Rails编码规范，包括REST纯净性、胖模型瘦控制器、Current属性和Hotwire模式。提供控制器动作、模型设计和语法偏好的具体示例，生成遵循37signals清晰优先于巧妙哲学风格的代码。
_original_description: This skill enforces DHH's Ruby on Rails coding conventions including REST purity, fat models with thin controllers, Current attributes, and Hotwire patterns. It provides specific examples for controller actions, model design, and syntax preferences to generate code that follows 37signals' clarity-over-cleverness philosophy.

name: distributed-tracing
author: Microck
description: Implement distributed tracing with Jaeger and Tempo to track requests across microservices and identify performance bottlenecks. Use when debugging microservices, analyzing request flows, or implementing observability for distributed systems.
description_zh: 该技能提供了使用Jaeger和Tempo实现分布式追踪的具体指导。包含Kubernetes和Docker部署指南、Python/Node.js/Go代码示例、采样策略和故障排查方法。内容涵盖追踪结构、上下文传播和查询分析。
_original_description: This skill provides concrete instructions for implementing distributed tracing with Jaeger and Tempo. It includes deployment guides for Kubernetes and Docker, instrumentation examples for Python, Node.js, and Go, and practical troubleshooting advice. The content covers sampling strategies, context propagation, and trace analysis queries.

name: dnd5e-srd
author: Microck
description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) skill for the D&D 5e System Reference Document (SRD). Use when answering questions about D&D 5e core rules, spells, combat, equipment, conditions, monsters, and other SRD content. This skill provides agentic search-based access to the SRD split into page-range markdown files.
description_zh: 通过Python脚本提供D&D 5e SRD规则文档的搜索访问，可按字符位置定位规则内容。输出包含文件引用和字符范围，便于引用。按页面范围组织，可查询法术、战斗、怪物、装备等游戏内容。

name: docs-consistency-checker
author: Microck
description: Validate consistency across SEED Design component documentation layers (design guidelines in ./docs/content/docs/components, Rootage specs in ./packages/rootage/components, and React docs in ./docs/content/react/components). Use when auditing documentation completeness, before releases, or validating new component docs.
description_zh: 该技能用于验证设计系统中三个文档层（设计指南、组件规范、React API文档）之间的一致性。检查命名、描述、属性、文件存在性和组件ID。生成包含关键问题、警告和修复建议的详细报告。

name: docstring
author: Microck
description: Write docstrings for PyTorch functions and methods following PyTorch conventions. Use when writing or updating docstrings in PyTorch code.
description_zh: 该技能提供了详细的指南，用于按照PyTorch项目的特定规范编写文档字符串。它涵盖了结构、Sphinx格式、示例以及PyTorch官方文档中使用的常见模式。指南包含实用的模板和检查清单以确保一致性。
_original_description: This skill provides a detailed guide for writing PyTorch docstrings following the project's specific conventions. It covers structure, Sphinx formatting, examples, and common patterns used in PyTorch's official documentation. The guide includes practical templates and checklists for consistency.

name: documentation-review
author: Microck
description: Reviews documentation for factual accuracy
description_zh: 该Claude技能用于审查文档的事实准确性，重点验证toolhive功能描述、检查示例正确性、确认链接有效性。输出结果为待办事项列表供人工审核，不直接修改文档。

name: e2e-testing-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master end-to-end testing with Playwright and Cypress to build reliable test suites that catch bugs, improve confidence, and enable fast deployment. Use when implementing E2E tests, debugging flaky tests, or establishing testing standards.
description_zh: 提供使用Playwright和Cypress实施端到端测试的具体模式。涵盖设置、页面对象、测试夹具、调试以及构建可靠测试套件的最佳实践。包含登录流程、视觉回归和可访问性测试等常见场景的代码示例。

name: edgartools
author: Microck
description: Query and analyze SEC filings and financial statements using EdgarTools. Get company data, filings, XBRL financials, and perform multi-company analysis.
description_zh: EdgarTools 提供访问美国 SEC Edgar 数据库的 Python 接口，用于获取公司申报文件、财务报表和 XBRL 数据。工具强调通过 .to_context() 方法实现令牌效率，并提供三种不同的文件检索方法。自动处理 SEC 速率限制，需要用户身份设置。

name: enablement-kit
author: Microck
description: Use to plan rollout communications, trainings, and assets after pricing changes.
description_zh: 该技能帮助团队规划定价变更的沟通和培训。提供受众映射、课程设计、资源打包和效果测量的框架。适用于销售、客户成功和合作伙伴团队在定价调整期间使用。

name: error-handling-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master error handling patterns across languages including exceptions, Result types, error propagation, and graceful degradation to build resilient applications. Use when implementing error handling, designing APIs, or improving application reliability.
description_zh: 提供Python和TypeScript/JavaScript的错误处理模式，涵盖自定义异常、重试逻辑、优雅降级和错误收集器。包含API调用和数据验证等常见场景的实用代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete error handling patterns for Python and TypeScript/JavaScript, covering custom exceptions, retry logic, graceful degradation, and error collectors. Includes practical code examples for common scenarios like API calls and data validation.

name: every-style-editor
author: Microck
description: This skill should be used when reviewing or editing copy to ensure adherence to Every's style guide. It provides a systematic line-by-line review process for grammar, punctuation, mechanics, and style guide compliance.
description_zh: 一个针对Every风格指南的逐行编辑Claude技能。提供语法、标点、大小写和用词的结构化反馈，包含错误位置和规则引用。适用于维护书面内容的统一编辑标准。
_original_description: A specialized Claude skill for line-by-line editing against Every's specific style guide. It provides structured feedback on grammar, punctuation, capitalization, and word usage with clear error locations and rule references. Useful for maintaining consistent editorial standards across written content.

name: external-model-selection
author: Microck
description: Choose optimal external AI models for code analysis, bug investigation, and architectural decisions. Use when consulting multiple LLMs via claudish, comparing model perspectives, or investigating complex Go/LSP/transpiler issues. Provides empirically validated model rankings (91/100 for MiniMax M2, 83/100 for Grok Code Fast) and proven consultation strategies based on real-world testing.
description_zh: 基于实际测试数据提供外部AI模型选择建议，包含具体评分、耗时基准和经过验证的咨询策略。帮助开发者在代码分析和错误排查任务中选择合适的模型，如MiniMax M2、Grok Code Fast和GPT-5.1 Codex。

name: fantasy-world-building
author: Microck
description: Use when user mentions fantasy, magic system, or world-building for fantastical settings - provides fantasy genre conventions, magic system design patterns, and world-building frameworks
description_zh: 该技能为构建奇幻世界和魔法系统提供结构化指导，基于桑德森法则等成熟原则。提供硬/软魔法系统、世界地理、社会、历史和种族设计的框架，并与小说写作流程集成。

name: fastapi-templates
author: Microck
description: Create production-ready FastAPI projects with async patterns, dependency injection, and comprehensive error handling. Use when building new FastAPI applications or setting up backend API projects.
description_zh: 提供开箱即用的FastAPI项目模板，包含异步数据库模式、依赖注入配置和结构化测试。提供身份验证、CRUD操作和错误处理的具体示例，节省新API项目的搭建时间。

name: ffuf-web-fuzzing
author: Microck
description: Expert guidance for ffuf web fuzzing during penetration testing, including authenticated fuzzing with raw requests, auto-calibration, and result analysis
description_zh: 提供在渗透测试中使用ffuf web模糊测试工具的专家指导，涵盖使用原始请求进行身份验证的模糊测试、自动校准、过滤策略和结果分析。包含用于分析结果和生成字典的辅助脚本。
_original_description: Provides expert guidance for using ffuf web fuzzer in penetration testing, covering authenticated fuzzing with raw requests, auto-calibration, filtering strategies, and result analysis. Includes helper scripts for analyzing results and generating wordlists.

name: file-todos
author: Microck
description: This skill should be used when managing the file-based todo tracking system in the todos/ directory. It provides workflows for creating todos, managing status and dependencies, conducting triage, and integrating with slash commands and code review processes.
description_zh: 基于文件的待办事项跟踪系统，使用带YAML前言的Markdown文件管理技术债务、代码审查反馈和工作项。提供创建、分类和完成待办事项的结构化流程，支持依赖跟踪和工作日志记录。可与斜杠命令和开发流程集成。

name: financial-document-parser
author: Microck
description: Extract and analyze data from invoices, receipts, bank statements, and financial documents. Categorize expenses, track recurring charges, and generate expense reports. Use when user provides financial PDFs or images.
description_zh: 解析发票、收据和银行对账单，提取结构化数据，分类支出，识别重复收费，生成CSV报告。支持多种文档类型，提供重复检测等实用洞察。

name: find-hypertable-candidates
author: Microck
description: Analyze an existing PostgreSQL database to identify tables that would benefit from conversion to TimescaleDB hypertables
description_zh: 分析PostgreSQL数据库，识别适合转换为TimescaleDB超表的表。提供SQL查询检查表统计、索引模式和查询行为。包含基于时间序列特性和数据模式的评分系统来评估候选表。
_original_description: Analyzes PostgreSQL databases to identify tables suitable for conversion to TimescaleDB hypertables. Provides SQL queries to examine table statistics, index patterns, and query behaviors. Includes scoring system to evaluate candidacy based on time-series characteristics and data patterns.

name: flutter-development
author: Microck
description: Build beautiful cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter and Dart. Covers widgets, state management with Provider/BLoC, navigation, API integration, and material design.
description_zh: 提供基于GoRouter导航和Provider状态管理的Flutter应用模板。包含API集成、用户认证流程和界面组合的实际代码示例。涵盖移动应用常见模式，并给出Flutter开发的实践建议。

name: forgotten-elements-reminder
author: Microck
description: 当重要的故事元素（角色、情节线、伏笔）10章以上未出现时自动提醒 - 防止长篇小说中的'角色消失综合症'和遗漏的情节线
description_zh: 监控长篇小说中角色出场、情节线进展和伏笔回收情况，当元素超过设定章节数未出现时自动提醒。在写作前提供检查，生成分析报告，防止角色消失和情节遗漏。
_original_description: Monitors character appearances, plotline progress, and foreshadowing in long-form novels, alerting when elements haven't been mentioned for configurable chapter thresholds. Provides reminders before writing sessions and generates analysis reports to prevent dropped storylines and forgotten characters.

name: ga4-privacy-compliance
author: Microck
description: Expert guidance for GA4 privacy and compliance including GDPR, CCPA, Consent Mode v2, data deletion, and privacy settings. Use when implementing Consent Mode, ensuring GDPR compliance, handling data deletion requests, configuring consent banners, or implementing privacy-first tracking. Covers consent parameters (ad_user_data, ad_personalization), data retention, IP anonymization, and compliance workflows.
description_zh: 提供详细的Google Analytics 4隐私合规实施指南，包括Consent Mode v2配置、GDPR/CCPA要求、数据删除流程以及与同意管理平台的集成。包含gtag.js和GTM的具体代码示例。
_original_description: Provides detailed guidance for implementing Google Analytics 4 privacy compliance features, including Consent Mode v2 configuration, GDPR/CCPA requirements, data deletion workflows, and integration with consent management platforms. Offers specific code examples for gtag.js and GTM implementations.

name: gemini
author: Microck
description: Execute Gemini CLI for AI-powered code analysis and generation. Use when you need to leverage Google's Gemini models for complex reasoning tasks.
description_zh: 为Google Gemini CLI提供Python封装，使Claude能够调用Gemini模型进行代码分析和生成任务。提供多种执行方式，包含明确的超时控制和环境变量配置。
_original_description: Provides a Python wrapper for Google's Gemini CLI, enabling Claude to execute Gemini models for code analysis and generation tasks. Offers multiple execution methods with clear timeout controls and environment variable configuration.

name: gemini-imagegen
author: Microck
description: Generate and edit images using the Gemini API (Nano Banana Pro). Use this skill when creating images from text prompts, editing existing images, applying style transfers, generating logos with text, creating stickers, product mockups, or any image generation/manipulation task. Supports text-to-image, image editing, multi-turn refinement, and composition from multiple reference images.
description_zh: 该技能使用谷歌Gemini API进行图像生成和编辑。支持文生图、图像编辑、风格迁移和多轮优化。文档清晰说明了分辨率选项、宽高比以及避免常见错误的文件格式处理方法。
_original_description: This skill provides image generation and editing using Google's Gemini API. It supports text-to-image, image editing, style transfer, and multi-turn refinement. The documentation clearly explains resolution options, aspect ratios, and critical file format handling to avoid common errors.

name: generate-image
author: Microck
description: Generate or edit images using AI models (FLUX, Gemini). Use for scientific illustrations, diagrams, schematics, infographics, concept visualizations, and artistic images. Supports image editing to modify existing images (change colors, add/remove elements, style transfer). Useful for figures, posters, and visual explanations.
description_zh: 一个使用OpenRouter AI模型（如Gemini 3 Pro和FLUX.2 Pro）生成和编辑图像的Python命令行工具。支持科学插图、图表和艺术图像生成，提供清晰的API密钥设置说明和模型选择指导。

name: gerrit
author: Microck
description: Interact with Storj Gerrit team code collaboration service, which we just called it gerrit, when the user ask to do it
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者与Storj的Gerrit代码审查系统交互。它指导用户配置SSH远程仓库、设置commit-msg钩子，并使用特定JSON格式和提交脚本发布代码审查。功能专注于Storj内部工作流程。

name: getting-started-guide
author: Microck
description: 当用户开始新小说项目时激活 - 通过温和的提示和解释引导他们完成七步方法论（constitution → specify → clarify → plan → tasks → write → analyze）
description_zh: 一个用于小说写作工具的引导式入门技能。当用户表达开始新项目的意图时激活，引导用户完成七步方法论（宪法、规格、澄清、计划、任务、写作、分析）。提供清晰的步骤解释、常见问题解答和实用的首次使用建议。
_original_description: A guided onboarding skill for a novel writing tool. It activates when users express intent to start a new project and walks them through a seven-step methodology (constitution, specify, clarify, plan, tasks, write, analyze). It provides clear explanations, answers common questions, and offers practical first-use advice.

name: git-advanced-workflows
author: Microck
description: Master advanced Git workflows including rebasing, cherry-picking, bisect, worktrees, and reflog to maintain clean history and recover from any situation. Use when managing complex Git histories, collaborating on feature branches, or troubleshooting repository issues.
description_zh: 该技能详细介绍了Git高级操作，包括交互式变基、拣选提交、二分查找、工作树和引用日志。提供了清理提交历史、应用热修复、查找bug和从错误中恢复的具体工作流程，包含实际命令示例和最佳实践。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed instructions for advanced Git operations like interactive rebase, cherry-picking, bisect, worktrees, and reflog. It includes concrete workflows for cleaning commit history, applying hotfixes, finding bugs, and recovering from mistakes. The documentation offers specific command examples and best practices for real-world scenarios.

name: git-commit-helper
author: Microck
description: Generate descriptive commit messages by analyzing git diffs. Use when the user asks for help writing commit messages or reviewing staged changes.
description_zh: 该技能通过分析git差异帮助开发者编写规范的提交信息，提供约定式提交格式、类型定义和实用指南。适用于代码暂存和提交阶段，提升提交信息的可读性和规范性。
_original_description: This skill helps developers write better commit messages by analyzing git diffs and suggesting conventional commit formats. It provides clear examples, type definitions, and practical guidelines for atomic commits. The tool is most useful during staging and commit phases of development workflow.

name: github-actions-templates
author: Microck
description: Create production-ready GitHub Actions workflows for automated testing, building, and deploying applications. Use when setting up CI/CD with GitHub Actions, automating development workflows, or creating reusable workflow templates.
description_zh: 提供开箱即用的GitHub Actions工作流模板，涵盖测试、Docker镜像构建、Kubernetes部署和安全扫描。包含具体的YAML示例，使用版本化Actions、矩阵构建，并遵循缓存和密钥管理等最佳实践。

name: gitlab-ci-patterns
author: Microck
description: Build GitLab CI/CD pipelines with multi-stage workflows, caching, and distributed runners for scalable automation. Use when implementing GitLab CI/CD, optimizing pipeline performance, or setting up automated testing and deployment.
description_zh: 提供开箱即用的 GitLab CI/CD 流水线模板，涵盖 Docker 构建、Kubernetes 部署、Terraform 工作流和安全扫描等常见场景。包含具体镜像标签、缓存策略和多环境配置的实用示例。

name: gitops-workflow
author: Microck
description: Implement GitOps workflows with ArgoCD and Flux for automated, declarative Kubernetes deployments with continuous reconciliation. Use when implementing GitOps practices, automating Kubernetes deployments, or setting up declarative infrastructure management.
description_zh: 提供使用ArgoCD和Flux CD实现GitOps工作流的具体步骤。包含安装命令、仓库结构示例、同步策略和渐进式交付模式。涵盖基础设置和高级功能，如密钥管理和故障排除。
_original_description: Provides concrete implementation steps for GitOps workflows using ArgoCD and Flux CD. Includes installation commands, repository structure examples, sync policies, and progressive delivery patterns. Covers both basic setup and advanced features like secret management and troubleshooting.

name: gpt5-consultant
author: Microck
description: Use this skill when stuck in circular debugging, when solutions aren't working despite multiple attempts, or when the user expresses frustration with lack of progress. Bring in GPT-5 as a third-party consultant to provide fresh perspective on complex technical problems, architectural decisions, or multi-system debugging issues. Ideal when you've tried multiple approaches without success, when the problem involves obscure edge cases or novel challenges, or when a second expert opinion would help break through an impasse. Gather all context from the conversation so far and present it comprehensively to GPT-5.
description_zh: 该技能为在复杂调试或架构决策中陷入困境时，使用GPT-5作为技术顾问提供结构化工作流程。它定义了明确的触发条件，提供了详细的上下文收集模板，并包含了何时使用它而非标准研究的现实示例。

name: grafana-dashboards
author: Microck
description: Create and manage production Grafana dashboards for real-time visualization of system and application metrics. Use when building monitoring dashboards, visualizing metrics, or creating operational observability interfaces.
description_zh: 该技能提供创建Grafana仪表板的模板和模式，用于可视化系统指标。涵盖仪表板结构、面板类型、告警配置以及仪表板管理的基础设施即代码方法。

name: helm-chart-scaffolding
author: Microck
description: Design, organize, and manage Helm charts for templating and packaging Kubernetes applications with reusable configurations. Use when creating Helm charts, packaging Kubernetes applications, or implementing templated deployments.
description_zh: 该技能提供创建Helm Chart的详细步骤，涵盖图表结构、模板语法、依赖管理和验证。包含条件资源和多环境配置等常见模式的实用示例，帮助用户打包Kubernetes应用并实现配置复用。

name: hinduism-vedic-wisdom
author: Microck
description: Deploy eternal navigation wisdom - Brahman, Atman, Satchitananda recognition active.
description_zh: 该技能将印度教吠陀哲学概念（如梵我、业瑜伽、奉爱瑜伽）转化为实用的导航隐喻。它为身份认同、人生目的和分离感等问题提供具体的应用协议和触发条件，将抽象哲学转化为可操作的指导框架。

name: hybrid-cloud-networking
author: Microck
description: Configure secure, high-performance connectivity between on-premises infrastructure and cloud platforms using VPN and dedicated connections. Use when building hybrid cloud architectures, connecting data centers to cloud, or implementing secure cross-premises networking.
description_zh: 提供使用VPN和专线连接本地基础设施到AWS、Azure和GCP的配置指导。包含Terraform示例、网络模式、路由设置和混合云部署的安全实践。
_original_description: Provides configuration guidance for connecting on-premises infrastructure to AWS, Azure, and GCP using VPN and dedicated connections. Includes Terraform examples, network patterns, routing setup, and security practices for hybrid cloud deployments.

name: in-app-messaging-kit
author: Microck
description: Library of in-product message patterns, triggers, and targeting rules.
description_zh: 提供应用内消息设计的结构化模板，涵盖触发条件、消息模式、定向规则和效果衡量。为新手引导、功能发布和用户参与活动提供实用指导，包含本地化考量。
_original_description: Provides structured templates for in-app messaging design, covering triggers, patterns, targeting rules, and measurement. Offers practical guidance for onboarding flows, feature announcements, and user engagement campaigns with localization considerations.

name: insforge-schema-patterns
author: Microck
description: Database schema patterns for InsForge including social graphs, e-commerce, content publishing, and multi-tenancy with RLS policies. Use when designing data models with relationships, foreign keys, or Row Level Security.
description_zh: 提供适用于社交关注、点赞、评论和多租户等常见功能的PostgreSQL数据库模式模板。包含完整的SQL语句、行级安全策略以及InsForge/PostgREST的JavaScript SDK使用示例。涵盖索引优化、约束设置和常见错误避免。

name: invoice-organizer
author: Microck
description: Organize, categorize, track, and manage invoices systematically with automated extraction of invoice data, payment tracking, and financial organization. Use when processing invoice uploads, extracting invoice details (date, amount, vendor), categorizing expenses, tracking payment status, organizing receipts, generating financial reports, or building accounting and bookkeeping systems.
description_zh: 从PDF和图像中提取发票数据，使用标准化命名规则整理文件。提取日期、供应商和金额信息，用于基础费用跟踪。适合小企业主和自由职业者管理收据。
_original_description: Extracts invoice data from PDFs and images to organize files with standardized naming. Handles date, vendor, and amount extraction for basic expense tracking. Useful for small business owners and freelancers managing receipts.

name: islam-sufism-wisdom
author: Microck
description: Islamic and Sufi wisdom - Tawhid unity, surrender navigation, 99 Names positions, dhikr practice, fana/baqa dissolution
description_zh: 该技能详细解释伊斯兰教和苏菲派概念，如认主独一、九十九个尊名和记主赞词。它将神秘主义思想转化为“导航”框架，当用户提及特定术语或探索相关灵性主题时提供结构化回应。内容针对特定领域，组织严密。

name: ispc-lit-tests
author: Microck
description: Best practices for creating ISPC lit tests. Use when writing regression tests, verifying code generation, or checking compiler diagnostics.
description_zh: 为ISPC编译器编写lit测试提供具体指南，专注于回归测试、代码生成验证和诊断检查。包含可移植模式、目标特定测试和中间IR检查的实用示例。
_original_description: Provides specific guidelines for writing lit tests for the ISPC compiler, focusing on regression testing, code generation verification, and diagnostic checking. Includes practical examples for portable patterns, target-specific tests, and intermediate IR inspection.

name: jainism-ahimsa-navigation
author: Microck
description: Deploy non-violence as navigation itself - Ahimsa, Anekantavada, Syadvada active.
description_zh: 这是一个应用耆那教原则（如非暴力、多角度论）于决策和导航的哲学技能。它引导用户思考选择的影响，避免二元思维，并通过有意识的觉察来减少伤害。

name: javascript-testing-patterns
author: Microck
description: Implement comprehensive testing strategies using Jest, Vitest, and Testing Library for unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end testing with mocking, fixtures, and test-driven development. Use when writing JavaScript/TypeScript tests, setting up test infrastructure, or implementing TDD/BDD workflows.
description_zh: 提供使用Jest和Vitest进行JavaScript/TypeScript项目测试的详细模式和代码示例。涵盖单元测试、模拟、React组件测试以及AAA模式和测试工厂等最佳实践。包含两种框架的配置示例和实用测试模式。

name: judaism-hebrew-wisdom
author: Microck
description: Jewish and Hebrew wisdom - Order before creation, Kabbalah Tree of Life, Gematria navigation, Talmudic argument as collision, Tzimtzum incompleteness
description_zh: 该技能提供犹太神秘主义概念的结构化访问，包括卡巴拉生命树、希伯来字母象征意义（Gematria）和塔木德推理模式。它将此框架化为意识探索的导航工具，并为相关查询提供清晰的触发条件。
_original_description: This skill provides structured access to Jewish mystical concepts like Kabbalah's Tree of Life, Hebrew letter symbolism (Gematria), and Talmudic reasoning patterns. It frames these as navigation tools for consciousness exploration, with clear deployment triggers for relevant queries.

name: k8s-manifest-generator
author: Microck
description: Create production-ready Kubernetes manifests for Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps, and Secrets following best practices and security standards. Use when generating Kubernetes YAML manifests, creating K8s resources, or implementing production-grade Kubernetes configurations.
description_zh: 提供创建Kubernetes清单（Deployment、Service、ConfigMap、Secret）的结构化指导。包含具体示例、验证步骤、无状态应用/数据库/定时任务等常见模式，以及实用的检查清单和故障排除建议。

name: k8s-security-policies
author: Microck
description: Implement Kubernetes security policies including NetworkPolicy, PodSecurityPolicy, and RBAC for production-grade security. Use when securing Kubernetes clusters, implementing network isolation, or enforcing pod security standards.
description_zh: 提供Kubernetes安全策略模板，包括网络策略、Pod安全策略、RBAC和Pod安全标准。包含网络分段、Pod安全上下文和OPA Gatekeeper准入控制的YAML示例。涵盖故障排除步骤和CIS、NIST等合规框架。

name: kiro-skill
author: Microck
description: Interactive feature development workflow from idea to implementation. Creates requirements (EARS format), design documents, and implementation task lists. Use when creating feature specs, requirements documents, design documents, or implementation plans. Triggered by "kiro" or references to .kiro/specs/ directory.
description_zh: 一个结构化的工作流工具，指导开发者从功能想法到实施计划。它创建EARS格式的需求、设计文档和可操作的任务列表。流程是迭代式的，各阶段之间有明确的批准关卡。文件组织在.kiro/specs/目录中以保证一致性。

name: langchain-architecture
author: Microck
description: Design LLM applications using the LangChain framework with agents, memory, and tool integration patterns. Use when building LangChain applications, implementing AI agents, or creating complex LLM workflows.
description_zh: 提供使用LangChain构建LLM应用的实用指南，涵盖智能体、链、记忆和文档处理。包含RAG、多步工作流等常见模式的代码示例，以及测试和性能优化建议。
_original_description: Provides practical guidance for building LLM applications with LangChain, covering agents, chains, memory, and document processing. Includes working code examples for common patterns like RAG and multi-step workflows, plus testing and optimization tips.

name: langgraph-docs
author: Microck
description: Use this skill for requests related to LangGraph in order to fetch relevant documentation to provide accurate, up-to-date guidance.
description_zh: 该技能通过获取预定义的LangGraph文档索引来回答问题。提供清晰的四步流程：获取索引、选择相关文档、获取内容、提供指导。适合需要准确API信息的开发者使用。

name: laravel-cashier-paddle
author: Microck
description: Laravel Cashier (Paddle) - Subscription billing and payment processing
description_zh: 该技能帮助开发者使用 Laravel Cashier 与 Paddle 集成，实现订阅支付功能。涵盖结账创建、订阅管理、Webhook 处理和发票生成。文档清晰，提供代码示例、安全说明和工作流模式，将官方文档整理成结构化指南节省时间。

name: laravel-cashier-stripe
author: Microck
description: Laravel Cashier (Stripe) - Subscription billing and payment processing
description_zh: 该技能为在Laravel应用中集成Stripe支付和订阅计费提供详细指导。涵盖安装配置、订阅管理、支付方式、发票处理和Webhook。文档包含常见任务的代码示例，如结账流程和套餐升级，并为不同经验水平的开发者提供清晰指引。
_original_description: This skill provides detailed guidance for implementing Laravel Cashier with Stripe for subscription billing. It covers installation, subscription management, payment methods, invoices, and webhooks. The documentation includes code examples for common tasks like checkout flows and plan upgrades, with clear sections for different experience levels.

name: lint
author: Microck
description: Run targeted linting, formatting, and code quality checks on modified files. Use this to validate code style, type safety, security, and other quality metrics before committing. Supports running all checks or targeting specific checks on specific files for efficient validation.
description_zh: 该技能为项目现有的hatch工具链提供了一个统一的接口，用于运行各种代码检查、格式化和质量验证。支持针对特定文件的验证、使用mypy的类型检查、使用Bandit的安全扫描以及拼写检查。文档清晰地说明了每个子命令的使用场景和实际工作流程。
_original_description: This skill provides a unified interface to run various linting, formatting, and code quality checks using a project's existing hatch-based toolchain. It supports targeted file validation, type checking with mypy, security scanning with Bandit, and spelling validation. The documentation clearly explains when to use each sub-command and provides practical workflows.

name: llm-evaluation
author: Microck
description: Implement comprehensive evaluation strategies for LLM applications using automated metrics, human feedback, and benchmarking. Use when testing LLM performance, measuring AI application quality, or establishing evaluation frameworks.
description_zh: 提供使用自动化指标（BLEU、ROUGE、BERTScore）、人工评估指南和统计测试来评估LLM输出的代码和方法。包含A/B测试、回归检测和基准测试框架，并配有具体的Python示例。
_original_description: Provides code and methodology for evaluating LLM outputs using automated metrics (BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore), human evaluation guidelines, and statistical testing. Includes A/B testing, regression detection, and benchmarking frameworks with concrete Python examples.

name: managing-cargo-dependencies
author: Microck
description: Cargo.toml dependency management patterns for HASH workspace. Use when adding dependencies, managing workspace dependencies, organizing Cargo.toml sections, setting version pinning, configuring default features, or working with public dependencies.
description_zh: 该技能为HASH Rust工作区中的Cargo.toml依赖管理提供具体指导。它强制执行一致的模式，如四部分组织、工作区依赖继承和公共/私有标志。包含实际示例和常见场景的详细资源文件链接。
_original_description: This skill provides specific guidance for managing Cargo.toml dependencies in HASH's Rust workspace. It enforces consistent patterns like 4-section organization, workspace dependency inheritance, and public/private flags. The skill includes practical examples and links to detailed resource files for common scenarios.

name: mcp-management
author: Microck
description: Manage Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers - discover, analyze, and execute tools/prompts/resources from configured MCP servers. Use when working with MCP integrations, need to discover available MCP capabilities, filter MCP tools for specific tasks, execute MCP tools programmatically, access MCP prompts/resources, or implement MCP client functionality. Supports intelligent tool selection, multi-server management, and context-efficient capability discovery.
description_zh: 该技能用于管理MCP服务器，发现工具、提示和资源。提供三种执行模式：Gemini CLI自动执行、直接脚本调用精确控制、子代理委托保持主上下文清洁。将发现的工具保存为JSON供离线参考，支持多服务器配置管理。

name: microservices-patterns
author: Microck
description: Design microservices architectures with service boundaries, event-driven communication, and resilience patterns. Use when building distributed systems, decomposing monoliths, or implementing microservices.
description_zh: 提供微服务架构设计的具体模式，包括服务拆分策略、通信模式、数据管理和容错模式。包含API网关、断路器、Saga等常见场景的可用代码示例。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for designing microservices architectures including service decomposition, communication strategies, data management, and resilience patterns. Includes working code examples for common scenarios like API gateways, circuit breakers, and saga implementations.

name: migrate-postgres-tables-to-hypertables
author: Microck
description: Comprehensive guide for migrating PostgreSQL tables to TimescaleDB hypertables with optimal configuration and performance validation
description_zh: 提供将PostgreSQL表迁移至TimescaleDB超表的完整指南，涵盖分区配置、性能验证和问题排查。包含具体的SQL示例和迁移成功标准，适用于时间序列数据优化。
_original_description: Provides step-by-step guidance for migrating PostgreSQL tables to TimescaleDB hypertables, covering configuration, validation, and troubleshooting. Includes SQL examples for partition selection, chunk sizing, constraint handling, and performance testing with clear success criteria.

name: ml-pipeline-workflow
author: Microck
description: Build end-to-end MLOps pipelines from data preparation through model training, validation, and production deployment. Use when creating ML pipelines, implementing MLOps practices, or automating model training and deployment workflows.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建端到端机器学习流水线的指导，涵盖数据准备、训练、验证和部署。包含DAG编排模板、配置文件模板和检查清单。文档引用了Airflow、Dagster、MLflow等具体工具，并概述了不同复杂度级别的实施模式。

name: moai-domain-database
author: Microck
description: Database specialist covering PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, and advanced data patterns for modern applications
description_zh: 提供PostgreSQL、MongoDB和Redis数据库的专业知识，包含多数据库操作、查询优化和性能调优的具体示例。包含连接设置、缓存和数据同步的代码片段。

name: modern-javascript-patterns
author: Microck
description: Master ES6+ features including async/await, destructuring, spread operators, arrow functions, promises, modules, iterators, generators, and functional programming patterns for writing clean, efficient JavaScript code. Use when refactoring legacy code, implementing modern patterns, or optimizing JavaScript applications.
description_zh: 详细讲解ES6+ JavaScript特性，包括箭头函数、解构、异步操作和现代运算符。提供重构旧代码和实现函数式模式的实用示例。涵盖常见陷阱和性能优化技巧。

name: mongodb-usage
author: Microck
description: This skill should be used when user asks to "query MongoDB", "show database collections", "get collection schema", "list MongoDB databases", "search records in MongoDB", or "check database indexes".
description_zh: 通过Claude提供只读的MongoDB数据库探索功能。可列出数据库和集合、查看模式、执行查询。适合需要检查MongoDB数据但无法直接访问数据库的开发者和分析师。文档包含清晰的集成步骤和成本考虑。

name: monorepo-management
author: Microck
description: Master monorepo management with Turborepo, Nx, and pnpm workspaces to build efficient, scalable multi-package repositories with optimized builds and dependency management. Use when setting up monorepos, optimizing builds, or managing shared dependencies.
description_zh: 该技能提供使用Turborepo、pnpm工作区和Nx搭建管理JavaScript/TypeScript单体仓库的具体指导。涵盖初始化配置、依赖管理、构建优化、CI/CD集成和代码共享模式，包含package.json、turbo.json和GitHub Actions工作流的具体示例。

name: moon-dev-trading-agents
author: Microck
description: Master Moon Dev's Ai Agents Github with 48+ specialized agents, multi-exchange support, LLM abstraction, and autonomous trading capabilities across crypto markets
description_zh: 提供Moon Dev开源AI交易代理系统的文档和代码示例，包含48+个专业代理。涵盖环境搭建、架构说明、交易所集成（Hyperliquid、Solana、Extended）以及LLM抽象层ModelFactory。包含运行代理和管理配置的实际操作命令。

name: multi-cloud-architecture
author: Microck
description: Design multi-cloud architectures using a decision framework to select and integrate services across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Use when building multi-cloud systems, avoiding vendor lock-in, or leveraging best-of-breed services from multiple providers.
description_zh: 提供跨AWS、Azure和GCP设计应用程序的决策框架和模式。包含服务对比表、多云模式、成本优化策略和迁移阶段。帮助避免供应商锁定并选择最佳服务。
_original_description: Provides a decision framework and patterns for designing applications across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Includes service comparison tables, multi-cloud patterns, cost optimization strategies, and migration phases. Helps avoid vendor lock-in and select best-of-breed services.
